name: Brevo
description: Monitor Brevo email marketing platform for user access and data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Brevo at https://app.brevo.com
2. Go to Account → SMTP & API
3. Click Generate a new API key
4. Copy the key and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Brevo → Account → SMTP & API → API Keys

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Brevo account users and their access levels

checks.name: Data Masking
checks.description: Verifies Brevo email sending domain is authenticated to prevent spoofing
